subcodes.first_line: In certain matters We look to outward means, wherefore these remain subject to delay and postponement; otherwise, verily He doth order all affairs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در بعضی از امور باسباب ناظریم لذا در عهدهٴ تأخیر و تعویق میماند والا انه یجری الأمور
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for tests and difficulties, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
